rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifier references or removing invalid clauses.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations: int, real, bool.
Align assumed types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE clauses must use valid expression types; avoid undefined identifiers.
AGREE property declarations use eq, const, assume, guarantee syntax.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions
AGREE validator diagnostics beyond type resolution
